# Senger Engineering

> Senger Engineering is a mechanical engineering consultancy based in Perth, Western Australia. The studio delivers first-principles mechanical design, FEA verification and manufacture-ready documentation for industrial, mining and architectural clients across Western Australia. Director-led delivery, written fixed-scope proposals within 48 hours, NDA on request.

Location: Perth, Western Australia, Australia
Service area: Western Australia (Perth, Pilbara, Goldfields, Mid West, South West) and remote engagements Australia-wide
Contact: info@senger.com.au | +61 0413 886 800
ABN: 12 326 601 680

## Core services

- [Mechanical engineering](https://senger.com.au/mechanical-engineering.html): First-principles mechanical design, FEA verification, engineering calculations and manufacture-ready documentation. Compliant with AS 4100, AS 3990, AS/NZS 1170 and related Australian Standards.
- [Fabrication and shop drawings](https://senger.com.au/fabrication-drawings.html): Manufacturing-ready drawings to AS 1100, including weld schedules, bolt callouts and BOMs ready for direct release to the fabricator.
- [Product development](https://senger.com.au/product-development.html): End-to-end mechanical product engineering — concept, DFM/DFA, FEA verification, prototyping and manufacture for founders, OEMs and industrial businesses.
- [3D renders and visualisation](https://senger.com.au/renders.html): Photoreal renders produced from native engineering models, for client approvals, design validation, marketing, tender submissions and proposal support.

## Engineering capability

- SOLIDWORKS and 3D modelling
- Finite Element Analysis (FEA) and structural simulation
- Manufacturing and fabrication detailing drawings
- Design for Manufacture (DFM) and Design for Assembly (DFA)
- Modular and transportable systems
- Engineering calculations and structural coordination
- Engineering documentation packages

## Australian Standards routinely applied

- AS 4100 — Steel structures
- AS 3990 — Mechanical equipment steelwork
- AS 4600 — Cold-formed steel
- AS/NZS 1170 — Structural design actions
- AS/NZS 1554 — Steel welding
- AS/NZS 5131 — Fabrication compliance
- AS 1657 — Platforms, walkways and stairs
- AS 1100 — Technical drawing

## Sectors served

- Mining and resources (Western Australia)
- Industrial and manufacturing
- Architectural and commercial construction
- Modular and transportable building systems

- [FAQ](https://senger.com.au/faq.html): Pricing, process, timelines, deliverables and engagement terms.

## How clients typically engage

1. Send a brief, sketch, specification or set of drawings to info@senger.com.au.
2. Free 30-minute scoping call to align on scope, constraints and intent.
3. Written fixed-scope proposal within 48 hours, with deliverables, timeline and fee.
4. Engineering delivery in stages, with checkpoints at concept, design freeze and release.
5. Final issue of manufacture-ready documentation, drawings and calculations.
